```motoi
(define (carve r c)
  (mark-visited! r c)
  (for-each
    (lambda (dir)
      (let ((nr (+ r (dy dir))) (nc (+ c (dx dir))))
        (when (and (in-bounds? nr nc) (not (visited? nr nc)))
          (knock-down! r c nr nc)
          (carve nr nc))))
    (shuffle '(up down left right))))
```
